task: Find young cats in Seattle and show off the newest additions.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by navigating to Petfinder, searching for cats in Seattle, applying the Young age filter, and successfully setting the sort to Newest Addition. The final page snapshot confirms the correct state: Seattle location, Young filter active, and sort combobox showing 'Newest Addition'. The newest listings visible on screen support the final summary, including names/details such as MILHOUSE, Maxine and Rubina, Astrea, Gregorio, Ariel Harmison, Devin, Smoky, Bandit, PURITA, and POTATO, along with distances, ages, sexes, and breeds. The provided profile links are backed by extracted hrefs from the visible result cards. Although there was some intermediate confusion with sorting and one duplicate listing omitted from the final top 10, the final result accurately shows off the newest young cat additions near Seattle.
final_result_response:
I found young cats near Seattle on Petfinder, sorted by **Newest Addition**. There are **508 young cat results** within the current 100-mile search, with out-of-town transport listings included.

Newest additions showing now:

1. [MILHOUSE](https://www.petfinder.com/cat/milhouse-071b086b-6491-4dc0-9875-0628b2f826a3/wa/kent/regional-animal-services-of-king-county-raskc-wa-wa63/details/) - 14 mi, young male, Domestic Short Hair  
2. [Maxine and Rubina](https://www.petfinder.com/cat/maxine-and-rubina-48344686-0bcb-4e0b-9b42-81d1f6c0a64d/bc/victoria/victoria-animal-control-services-ltd-bc90/details/) - 75 mi, young female, Domestic Short Hair  
3. [Astrea](https://www.petfinder.com/cat/astrea-bfc91202-560e-4928-a5ab-b662e4c199d0/wa/burlington/humane-society-of-skagit-valley-wa60/details/) - 64 mi, young female, Domestic Short Hair  
4. [Gregorio](https://www.petfinder.com/cat/gregorio-3d376418-232d-4368-b427-183aa58e4914/wa/renton/lone-star-pawz-tx2673/details/) - 11 mi, young male, Russian Blue  
5. [Ariel Harmison](https://www.petfinder.com/cat/ariel-harmison-5c110d9e-6023-441e-b96a-82fe088d4cf0/wa/arlington/three-little-pitties-rescue-tx2269/details/) - 39 mi, young female, Tuxedo / Domestic Short Hair, out of town  
6. [Devin](https://www.petfinder.com/cat/devin-77c9fc9e-212f-4d20-84b4-7faead2ca18f/wa/shoreline/seattle-area-feline-rescue-wa40/details/) - 12 mi, young male, Domestic Short Hair  
7. [Smoky](https://www.petfinder.com/cat/smoky-3d11cb1e-a6a6-4625-91a0-212fde0642e3/wa/bellingham/alternative-humane-society-of-whatcom-county-wa15/details/) - 79 mi, young male, Domestic Medium Hair  
8. [Bandit](https://www.petfinder.com/cat/bandit-d451b303-9c7d-449a-bfb4-2e85b7127019/wa/bellingham/alternative-humane-society-of-whatcom-county-wa15/details/) - 79 mi, young male, Domestic Medium Hair  
9. [PURITA](https://www.petfinder.com/cat/purita-f0f194a4-bcd8-4ad1-8ff3-12aa06fb8c29/wa/kent/regional-animal-services-of-king-county-raskc-wa-wa63/details/) - 14 mi, young female, Domestic Short Hair  
10. [POTATO](https://www.petfinder.com/cat/potato-d9506714-bc1a-4dd2-bada-e1b8a9fc758d/wa/kent/regional-animal-services-of-king-county-raskc-wa-wa63/details/) - 14 mi, young male, British Shorthair  

Search page: https://www.petfinder.com/search/cats-for-adoption/us/wa/seattle/?age%5B0%5D=Young&sort%5B0%5D=recently_added
action_history: Opening Petfinder: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.petfinder.com/');
Searching young cats in Seattle: await openTab('https://www.petfinder.com/search/cats-for-adoption/us/wa/seattle/?age%5B0%5D=Young&sort%5B0%5D=recently_added');
Applying Young age filter: await page.locator('e163').click();
Closing filter menu and reading page: await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
Sorting by newest additions: await page.locator('e226').click();
Clicking newest addition sort: await page.locator('e232').click();
Choosing Newest Addition by keyboard: await page.keyboard.press('ArrowUp');
Choosing Newest Addition by keyboard: await page.keyboard.press('ArrowUp');
Choosing Newest Addition by keyboard: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Selecting newest additions without pausing: await page.getByRole('combobox', { name: /Nearest|Sort/i }).click().catch(async () => {
Selecting newest additions without pausing: await page.getByText('Nearest').click();
Selecting newest additions without pausing: await page.getByRole('option', { name: 'Newest Addition' }).click();
Switching sort to newest additions: await page.locator('e236').click();
Switching sort to newest additions: await page.getByRole('option', { name: 'Newest Addition' }).click();
